shelter.name: The Shelter
shelter.description: A small, concrete room with a heavy atmosphere.

locations.name: Old rusty bed
locations.description: An old rusty bed. Something is sticking out under the mattress.

items.name: flashlight
items.description: A heavy military flashlight. It will come in handy in the dark.

hallway.name: The Hallway
hallway.description: A long corridor. The lights flicker and there are broken pipes.

locations.name: Electrical Panel
locations.description: The main panel. The wires are bare and they are carrying electricity.

trap.game_over_message: You touched bare wires. Electricity passed through your body. GAME OVER!

items.name: Blue Keycard
items.description: A plastic access card with a blue stripe.

locations.name: Gas Pipes
locations.description: Some pipes have cracks. A piece of duct tape is lying next to it.

items.name: Metal Pipe
items.description: A heavy, solid iron pipe. Can be used as a lever.

storage_room.name: Storage Room
storage_room.description: A dark windowless room filled with empty shelves. It smells like rot.

locations.name: Dusty Shelves
locations.description: Mostly empty cans, but there is a box at the top

items.name: Gas Mask
items.description: An old military gas mask with a fresh filter.

locations.name: Heavy Iron Door
locations.description: The door is on a spring mechanism. It wants to slam shut.

trap.game_over_message: The heavy door slammed shut behind you. It's locked from outside. You are trapped forever. GAME OVER!

garage.name: The Garage
garage.description: A spacious room with a rusted jeep in the middle. The smell of gasoline is overwhelming.

locations.name: Workbench
locations.description: Covered in oil and rusty tools.

items.name: Wire Cutters
items.description: Sharp enough to cut thick wires.

locations.name: Abandoned Jeep
locations.description: The keys are still in the ignition.

trap.game_over_message: You started the engine. The enclosed space quickly filled with carbon monoxide. GAME OVER!

clinic.name: The Clinic
clinic.description: Overturned stretchers and broken glass everywhere.

items.name: Red Key
items.description: A small key with a red tag.

locations.name: Quarantine Door
locations.description: A sealed glass door. There is a huge BIOHAZARD warning sign on it.

trap.game_over_message: You breathed in the airborne pathogen. Your lungs gave out within seconds. GAME OVER!

exit_room.name: Emergency Exit
exit_room.description: A massive steel gate leading to the surface. Freedom is close.

locations.name: Explosive Device
locations.description: A C4 charge wired directly to the gate's lock. It has a red and a blue wire.

trap.game_over_message: You tried to force the gate. The bomb detonated instantly. GAME OVER!

locations.name: Main Gate
locations.description: The final barrier. It has a keyhole with a red rim and a card reader with a blue light.

trap.game_over_message: The system locked down. You need the red key and blue keycard. (This trap just blocks progress, doesn't kill you)
